title: Electric Foot File, DIOZO Professional 10 in-1 Pedicure Kit Foot with 3 Rollers and 2 speeds, Rechargeable Waterproof Hard Skin Callus Remover for Cracked Heels and Dead Skin
features: 【Your Ideal Foot SPA Tool】Discover our pedicure kit, expertly crafted to address diverse skin concerns. This complete set includes 10* pedicure tools, 3* roller heads, 1* mini brush, and 1* USB cable. Achieve flawless feet effortlessly with this versatile toolkit—no need for a separate foot SPA.

【Friendly Functional Design of Callus Remover】Our foot file brings a comfortable and safe experience, equipped with 3 roller heads and 2 speeds. 3 different Roller heads include 1 fine roller head, 1 regular roller head, and 1 coarse roller head for different callus conditions. Meanwhile, 2 speeds of 1700x/min and 2000x/min can be chosen according to foot condition. If the pressure is too strong, it will automatically protect and stop.

【IPX 7 Waterproof Design of Pedicure Foot File】 This electronic foot file has a waterproof design, can be rinsed under running water. It allows you to wash it to keep it clean after use. It is suitable for wet and dry use.

【LCD Battery Power Display and Large Battery Capacity】The LCD display electronic callus remover allows you to see the battery power left. A 1200mAh battery capacity can be used for 150 minutes when the device is fully charged.

【Soft & Secure】 Effortlessly rejuvenate your feet with a 360-degree rotating exfoliation system that gently removes cracked heels, dry, hard, and thick skin, as well as calluses—all in just minutes. Enjoy a fast, painless foot spa experience, leaving your feet smooth, healthy, and elegantly soft.
description: Product Description DIOZO is a beauty manufacturer who specializes in beauty products. Our products are certificated by customers who uses our products. We aims to provide the best products and products experience. We believe this electric foot file will solve the problem which troubles you and can bring you confidence and beauty. Three Different Replacement Roller Heads Fine roller head for daily care; Regular roller head for newly formed callus; Coarse roller head for stubborn thick callus. Electric Foot File Callus Remover Package List 3*roller heads&1*mini brush&1*USB cable 1*Callus Remover&1*Cuticle Remover 1*Foot Polishing Board 1*Callus Scraper 1*Double Sided Sandpaper 1*V-shaped Putter Stick 1*Nail File 1*Corn Knife 1*Blade Silicone 1*Replacement Blade Callus Remover for Feet Specification Battery capacity: 1200mah Charging voltage: 5V Charge time: 2-3 hours (no more than 12 hours) Use time: 150 minutes when the device is fully charged Product Features Quickly remove hard skin and callus, heel cracked, dry, and thick skin automatically in minutes, Three different replacement roller heads. Pressure Protection Technology- if you press too hard, the device will power off to prevent any injuries. Large battery capacity - 1200 MAH lithium battery, support 150 min usage. Two speeds of operation- 1700x/min low speed and 2000x/min high speed. Intelligent design-IPX7 Waterproof, 5-level battery LCD display, non-slip design. For Many Skin Problems Rough Chapped Heels Corn Parched Skin Painful Foot Calluses Cracked Skin How to Use It Step 1: Soak your feet in comfortable water, wipe with dry cloth. Step 2: Press the button, put it on the area which you plan to heal gently. Step 3: clean the feet and remember to apply foot cream to bring better effect. Warm Tips Don’t push too hard, the foot file will stop automatically. Easy to Replace the Grinding Head After use, you can take off the head by pressing both sides of roller head, then clean it with water, which is more sanitary for next use. Large Battery Capacity 1200 MAH lithium battery, a fully charge could support 150 min usage. With USB cord, it supports corded and cordless usage.
